modules_created.description: Package init for the Bootstrap layer.

Creates a fresh RGECognitionChannel and RGERuntimeDispatcher, binds the dispatcher to the channel via set_runtime_dispatcher(), then exposes both via get_channel() and get_dispatcher(). Single source of truth for the bound channel/dispatcher pair.

Owns a RGERuntimeRegistry. initialize_runtime() creates an RGEBridgeNexus, then replaces the registry's internal dispatcher with the nexus dispatcher so that register_runtime() calls on the registry route to the same dispatcher the channel is bound to. Returns the initialized nexus.
System entry point. activate() runs RGERuntimeBootstrap.initialize_runtime(), stores the nexus, and returns it. get_nexus() returns the stored nexus or None if activate() has not yet been called.

activation_test.description: RGEBridgeNexus creates channel and dispatcher. Dispatcher registered with a runtime; channel.emit() forwards to dispatcher.dispatch() which delivers to runtime.handle_signal(). Signal identity confirmed.

registry_validation.description: RGERuntimeBootstrap.initialize_runtime() returns nexus whose dispatcher is the same object held by bootstrap.registry. Registering a runtime via registry and emitting via nexus channel reaches the runtime.

signal_propagation_test.description: Full end-to-end: RGEActivationManager.activate() initializes nexus. RGESignalBroadcaster bound to nexus channel. RGERecursionFieldEngine.propagate_packet() moves packet A→B, emits RGECognitionSignal; runtime subscriber attached to nexus dispatcher receives signal with correct packet_id, source_node='A', destination_node='B', timestamp.
